name: gym-tracker
description: Progressive Web App for workout tracking with exercise library, progress tracking, and workout plans

scripts.build:copy: if not exist dist\images mkdir dist\images && copy /Y images\* dist\images\ && copy /Y style.css dist\ && copy /Y index.html dist\ && copy /Y sw.js dist\ && copy /Y manifest.json dist\
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:copy
